backstory.original: Nixie is a charismatic tiefling that brings a chaotic element to the party. Growing up in a wealthy but oppressive household, Nixie was punished for using magic despite her natural talent. In a rebellious move, she stole the family grimoire to teach herself dark sorcery only to result in the burning down of her family manor and all her family inside. Despite this tragedy, Nixie is now on a journey to enjoy her newfound magical freedom and find a new family. When confronted by enemies, and occasionally even friends, she's always ready to hurl her favorite spell, Fireball, with unbridled enthusiasm.
backstory.display: 妮茜是一个魅力无边的提夫林，为探险队增加了些许混乱元素。妮茜在一个富裕但压抑的家庭长大，尽管天赋异禀，却曾因为使用魔法而受到惩罚。在一次叛逆行动中，她偷走了家族的魔典，用以自学黑暗魔法，结果却烧毁了她的家族庄园和里面的所有家人。经过这场悲剧之后，妮茜踏上了享受全新的魔法自由，以及寻找新家人的旅途。遇到敌人，有时甚至在遇到朋友时，她时刻准备着施放最爱的火球术，挥洒她肆无忌惮的热情。

description.original: Nixie attacks with a ball of fire centered on a random target dealing 1 hit of damage to all enemies in a small radius.
description.display: 妮茜以一名随机目标为中心发动火球攻击，对小范围内的所有敌人造成 1 次伤害。

description.original: Nixie casts a fireball that engulfs the battlefield, hitting all enemies.  Each monster hit may be surrounded by Engulfing Flames.
description.display: 妮茜施放一颗火球吞噬战场，击中所有敌人。每个被击中的怪物都有可能被吞噬烈焰所包围。

longDescription.original: Nixie casts a gigantic fireball that engulfs the entire enemy's side of the screen, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all enemies. In addition, there is a 10% chance for each monster hit by this attack to be surrounded by Engulfing Flames.
longDescription.display: 妮茜施放一颗巨型火球，吞噬敌侧的整个屏幕，对所有敌人造成 1 次杀招攻击。此外，被此攻击击中的怪物均有 10% 的几率被吞噬烈焰所包围。

description.original: Nixie increases the damage of all Champions with 17+ Charisma including herself.
description.display: 妮茜使所有魅力值为 17+ 的勇士伤害提高，包括她自己。

description.original: Each time Nixie makes a normal attack, there is a high chance that a random wild magic event happens. Many are good, some are not.
description.display: 每当妮茜发动普通攻击，均有较大几率发生随机的野魔法事件。大部分有益，少数有害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions with a Charisma of 17+ by $(amount)%, including herself.
$(source_hero)使所有魅力值为 17+ 的勇士（包括她自己）的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Nixie increases the damage of all Champions with 17+ Charisma including herself.
tipText.display: 妮茜使所有魅力值为 17+ 的勇士伤害提高，包括她自己。

description.desc: Each time $(source_hero) makes a normal attack, there is a high chance that a random wild magic event happens.

conditions.desc: ^^Engulfing Flames - $(source_hero) lights the area of her attack on fire for 20 seconds. While lit, it deals $(seconds_plural amount___2) of BUD to enemies in the effect each second.^Potted Punch - $(source_hero) turns into a potted plant for 5 seconds and can't attack, increasing the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id___5) by $(amount___5)% while in that form, and for 15 additional seconds afterwards.^Coin Cascade - Gold coins also fly out from her attack's explosion, worth $(amount___6)% of a normal monster kill.^Shockwave - $(source_hero)'s attack also sends out a shockwave that stuns Monsters in the attack's area for $(seconds_plural amount___7).^Feeling Blue - $(source_hero)'s skin turns blue for 10 seconds.^Eldritch Entourage - A random monster is summoned.^Enlarge - $(source_hero)'s size increases. Her damage also increases by $(amount___11)% for 20 seconds.

description.desc: 每当$(source_hero)发动普通攻击，均有较大几率发生随机的野魔法事件。

conditions.desc: ^^吞噬烈焰 - $(source_hero)点燃她攻击的区域，持续 20 秒。点燃时，每秒对受影响的敌人造成 $(seconds_plural amount___2) 的基础杀招伤害^盆栽能量 - $(source_hero)变成盆栽 5 秒，期间无法攻击。在此状态下，$(upgrade_name id___5)的伤害加成提高 $(amount___5)，之后额外持续 15 秒^金币瀑布 - 她的攻击爆炸中还会飞散出金币，价值为普通怪物击杀的 $(amount___6)^冲击波 - $(source_hero)的攻击还会发射冲击波，使攻击区域内的怪物眩晕 $(seconds_plural amount___7)^蓝色忧郁 - $(source_hero)的皮肤变蓝 10 秒^恐怖随从 - 随机召唤一个怪物^放大 - $(source_hero)的体型变大。她的伤害也提高 $(amount___11)%，持续 20 秒。

tipText.original: Each time Nixie makes a normal attack, there is a high chance that a random wild magic event happens. Many are good, some are not.
tipText.display: 每当妮茜发动普通攻击，均有较大几率发生随机的野魔法事件。大部分有益，少数有害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Tiefling champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位提夫林勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Nixie focuses on her Tiefling bond.
specializationDescription.display: 妮茜专注于她的提夫林同胞。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion with a total ability score of 78 or less in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位总属性值低于等于 78 的勇士，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Nixie focuses on her bond with others with Awful stats.
specializationDescription.display: 妮茜专注于她与其他属性不佳者的纽带。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Chaotic champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位混乱阵营勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id): Potted Punch by $(amount)% and $(upgrade_name id): Enlarge by $(amount___2)%
提高$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成：盆栽能量 $(amount)%，以及$(upgrade_name id)：放大 $(amount___2)%

description.original: Did you know you can break a bottle on someone's head??? Evandra showed me!
description.display: 你知道可以用别人的脑袋砸碎瓶子吗？？？伊万德拉表演给我看过！

description.original: The last person that grappled with me is a pile of ash now.
description.display: 上一个和我扭打在一起的人现在已经化为灰烬了。

description.original: Look at this Fireball! Can't you feel the fire in your hearts?! AHAHAH!
description.display: 瞧瞧这颗火球！你难道感受不到心中的火焰吗？！哈哈！

description.original: See, if you just use fireball these fights go faster.
description.display: 看，只要用上火球术，这些战斗就会加速。

description.original: Antrius says everyone looks more flattering in the warm glow of the flames!
description.display: 安裘斯说温暖的火焰让所有人看起来都更可爱了！

description.original: Evandra and I have been working out - look at this muscle!
description.display: 伊万德拉和我一直在锻炼--瞧瞧这肌肉！

description.original: When I see fire I just get really excited and want there to be more fire, okay?
description.display: 我看到火焰的时候就会异常兴奋，希望制造更多火焰，明白了吗？

description.original: But, I'm a fireproof plushie, right?
description.display: 不过，我是个防火的毛绒玩具，对吧？
迷人和害人，不就一字之差吗？

description.original: Look at me! I'm huge! I don't need a fireball anymore! I can just step on them!
description.display: Look at me! I'm huge! I don't need a fireball anymore! I can just step on them!

character_sheet_details.backstory: Nixie is a charismatic tiefling that brings a chaotic element to the party. Growing up in a wealthy but oppressive household, Nixie was punished for using magic despite her natural talent. In a rebellious move, she stole the family grimoire to teach herself dark sorcery only to result in the burning down of her family manor and all her family inside. Despite this tragedy, Nixie is now on a journey to enjoy her newfound magical freedom and find a new family. When confronted by enemies, and occasionally even friends, she's always ready to hurl her favorite spell, Fireball, with unbridled enthusiasm.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Nixie is a support DPS Champion whose Wild Magic causes random effects.

event_upgrades.name: Blazing Charisma

event_upgrades.name: Wild Magic Surge
event_upgrades.description: Each time Nixie makes a normal attack, there is a high chance that a random wild magic event happens. Many are good, some are not.

character_sheet_details.system_description: 妮茜是一名支持型伤害输出勇士，她的野魔法可产生随机效果。
